plugins.name: market-research-agent
plugins.description: Pre-diligence accelerator. Name a company; get a sourced, conflict-flagged three-part dossier (Company / Sector / Comparables) written to the Notion Market Research Dossiers database, with an optional branded Word doc. A verified starting point, not a substitute for the firm's DDE.
